commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=771f874d0793a4ccd0655e1b64b15e96948e6b4a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds optional tool-call metadata to WebChat stream segments and uses it while sorting chat items so a matching live tool card stays after the stream segment that introduced it.

PR surface: Source +41, Tests +24. Total +65 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main uses `Date.now()` for stream segment timestamps and then sorts rendered items by timestamp, so an older tool event timestamp can move the tool card ahead of its causal assistant text. I did not run a live browser/Gateway reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs a contributor-visible code fix plus real behavior proof; do not queue an automated repair because automation cannot supply the contributor's real WebChat proof.

target.title: fix(ui): preserve live tool stream order
target.body:
## Summary
- Fixes live WebChat ordering when a tool event timestamp is older than the assistant stream segment that introduced that tool call.
- Threads optional `toolCallId` metadata through chat stream segment types so the renderer can keep the matching tool card after its causal assistant text while preserving ordinary timestamp ordering.
- Adds a regression test for the delayed/live timestamp race behind #92122.

Fixes #92122

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.ui.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-ui.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.ts ui/src/ui/app-view-state.ts ui/src/ui/app.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: WebChat live streaming can render a tool card before the assistant text that triggered it when the tool message timestamp sorts earlier than the stream segment.

Real environment tested: Local Control UI rendering/model unit tests in the OpenClaw checkout on Node 22 via repo test wrappers.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts` with a regression case where `streamSegments[0].toolCallId` matches a tool card whose timestamp is older than the segment.

Evidence after fix: The regression asserts the rendered chat items remain `[assistant stream segment, matching tool card]` even when the tool card timestamp is earlier.

Observed result after fix: Focused chat item tests passed: 34 tests in `ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts`.

What was not tested: I did not run a full live browser Gateway session or produce a video artifact. The broader DOM chat render and controller tests passed locally, and `chat-responsive.browser.test.ts` is skipped in this local environment.
